title: App Settings - Navigation
scenario: Verify navigation within Poly Studio Mobile app settings menu using back icon and swipe gesture across all tabs
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap the hamburger icon (☰) to open the Poly Studio Menu (App Settings).
3. Tap any settings tab (e.g., Device Settings, Audio Settings, Notifications, Account) to display the corresponding screen.
4. Tap the back icon ("<") to return to the main menu.
5. Tap the same settings tab again.
6. Swipe right from the left edge of the screen to return to the main menu.
7. Repeat steps 3–6 for all available settings tabs (Device Settings, Audio Settings, Notifications, Account, etc.).
expected: User can access every settings tab and navigate back to the main Home screen using either the back icon or swipe gesture.
